CustomField.description:
Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub.
Enter the Census Tract the Property belongs to. Tip: Check an appraisal to find the Census Tract.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
Enter the Census Tract the Property belongs to.
Tip: Check an appraisal to find the Census Tract.
CustomField.label: Census Tract
